name: Ubiquiti UISP Switch Pro
title: Ubiquiti UISP Switch Pro
title_extended: Ubiquiti UISP Switch Pro – Gigabit Layer 2 PoE switch for ISP networks
short_description: Layer 2 PoE switch, 24x GbE RJ45 Ports, 4x 1/10G SFP+ Ports, Switching capacity 128 Gbps, Forwarding rate 95.23 Mpps
description: Ideal for ISP deployments, the UISP™ Switch Pro is a Layer 2 PoE switch with (24) GbE RJ45 ports and (4) 1/10G SFP ports for fiber uplinks. The UISP Switch Pro is an effective solution for ISPs looking to quickly deliver Gigabit wireless speeds to their customers. With its hefty 220W total PoE supply, the UISP Switch Pro delivers substantial power to every radio in your service network. The UISP Switch Pro is managed with the UISP application, a centralized platform where you can monitor and manage all of your UISP devices. In addition, the rackmount UISP S Pro comes with a 1.3-inch color LCM touchscreen that provides a concise way to provide important device and network status information.

detailed_description.heading: Gigabit Layer 2 PoE switch for ISP networks
detailed_description.text: Ideal for ISP deployments, the UISP™ Switch Pro is a Layer 2 PoE switch with (24) GbE RJ45 ports and (4) 1/10G SFP ports for fiber uplinks. The UISP Switch Pro is an effective solution for ISPs looking to quickly deliver Gigabit wireless speeds to their customers. With its hefty 220W total PoE supply, the UISP Switch Pro delivers substantial power to every radio in your service network. The UISP Switch Pro is managed with the UISP application, a centralized platform where you can monitor and manage all of your UISP devices. In addition, the rackmount UISP S Pro comes with a 1.3-inch color LCM touchscreen that provides a concise way to provide important device and network status information. The UISP S Pro can be set up in minutes and fully managed through the UISP App, a centralized platform for managing and configuring all UISP devices.

detailed_description.heading: UISP application support
detailed_description.text: Bluetooth-powered setup via the UISP Mobile app is available. Thanks to UISP app you can centrally manage your networks and clients with ease. Simply organize your clients' plans, setup billing and invoicing, and grow your customer base. UISP application allows viewing network topology, advanced data analytics, quickly set up devices and manage them on the go with a powerful mobile app. Managed with the UISP application: Version 1.5.7 and later.
